brief.program_description: This is a Class 1 small UAS program. It is an ISR platform that will have secondary missions of lethal payload and communications node. this is a very rapid program (likley under 18 months to production).

wizard_answers.a_program_description: this suas will be deployed with forward deployed units and will have a recon function. Additionally, it may be used to carry a lethal payload or it may be used to become a communications node for contested comms environments. key stakeholders are the user, contracting, budget folks, engineers, and program managers.
wizard_answers.e_similar_previous_programs: yes the Raven and the Puma aircraft
wizard_answers.f_tech_challenges_and_risk_areas: the sensor for the ISR payload and the communications processor are low trl.
wizard_answers.g_mosa_scenarios: i want to be able to buy a platform and then integrate any company's sensors, lethal payloads, and/or communication equipment.
wizard_answers.h_candidate_modules: airframe, propulsion unit, battery, flight control computer, lethal payload, communications payload, ISR sensor payload.

modules.name: airframe, propulsion unit, battery, flight control computer, lethal payload, communications payload, ISR sensor payload.
